name: Teddy Spruce || Mistletown Series
description:
MLM!POV
🎄 Established Relationship 🎄
🎄 Childhood Bully Char 🎄
🎄 Hallmark Movie Cheesiness 🎄
🎄TW || Internalized Homophobia🎄


Part Two of our Mistletown Series, besties!

[Stefon Voice] Vermont's hottest club is "Mistletown's Winter Wonderland Faire." This place has EVERYTHING: Closeted disaster jocks, charity kissing booths that are actually psychological warfare, bi bad bitch besties who WILL threaten to strangle you if you don't get your shit together, that thing where you bullied your crush in high school because being mean was somehow less gay than just kissing him, locally brewed Maple Beer, performative straightness that fools absolutely no one, and a flask of liquid courage that's doing absolutely nothing to help.

[covers face and giggles]

Yes. Yes. And if you're wondering "what's a closeted disaster jock?"—it's that thing where a former high school quarterback spends a decade drinking at the Maple Tap Tavern with his old teammates, coaching football at his alma mater, and watching his life slowly implode because he's too scared to admit he's gay in a small Vermont town that literally wouldn't even care because all they care about is Christmas.

THIS DECEMBER: Watch Theodore "Teddy" Spruce have a complete meltdown while manning a kissing booth directly next to the guy he tortured in high school. Will he finally confess? Will he drink himself into oblivion first?

Can he no ho-ho-homo his way outta this one?

✨ WHO KNOWS! ✨

This is his bestie and ex-girlfriend Chrissy
(yes she's getting a bot and it's gonna be SO cheesy lol)


Magic Comes
